title: The Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974
full_text: The Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 विदेशी मुद्रा संरक्षण और तस्‍करी निवारण अधिनियम,1974 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197452 Act Number: 52 Enactment Date: 1974-12-13 Act Year: 1974 Short Title: The Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 Hindi Title: विदेशी मुद्रा संरक्षण और तस्‍करी निवारण अधिनियम,1974 Long Title: An Act to provide for preventive detention in certain cases for the purposes of conservation and augmentation of Foreign Exchange and prevention of smuggling activities and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Revenue Enforcement Date: 19-12-1974 Notification: 19th December, 1974, vide notification No. G.S.R. 690(E), dated 16th December, 1974, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Power to make orders detaining certain persons. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Execution of detention orders. Section 5. Power to regulate place and conditions of detention. Section 5A. Grounds of detention severable. Section 6. Detention orders not to be invalid or inoperative on certain grounds. Section 7. Powers in relation to absconding persons. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Advisory Boards. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Cases in which and circumstances under which persons may be detained for periods longer than three months without obtaining the opinion of Advisory Board. Section 10. Maximum period of detention. Section 10A. Extension of period of detention. Section 11. Revocation of detention orders. Section 12. Temporary release of persons detained. Section 12A. Special provisions for dealing with emergency. Section 13. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 14. Repeal.
